raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 3,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "R1.7": 1,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent did not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, but flagged at least one claim (the 'no manual tuning' claim) that requires more evidence.",
    "R1.6": "The agent performed a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, improving sentence structure and wording for clarity.",
    "R1.7": "The agent did not engage with citations at all, beyond preserving the existing reference style.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (the 'no manual tuning' claim), but did not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, with no scope drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free and identifies no harmful patterns in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "The agent blended sources without traceability, making it difficult to identify the origin of changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.4,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.3
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent did not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, but flagged at least one claim (the 'no manual tuning' claim) that requires more evidence.
rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, improving sentence structure and wording for clarity.
rationale.R1.7: The agent did not engage with citations at all, beyond preserving the existing reference style.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (the 'no manual tuning' claim), but did not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, with no scope drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies no harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent blended sources without traceability, making it difficult to identify the origin of changes.
